label: Plugin (interceptor)
postNote: Register the plugin in app/code/${vendor}/${module}/etc/di.xml — add: <type name="Target\Class"><plugin name="${vendor}_${module}_${pluginName}" type="${vendor}\${module}\Plugin\${pluginName}"/></type>. (XML config is hand-merged — the engine's deep-merge is JSON-only.) sortOrder required if you have multiple plugins (commerce/plugin-sort-order).
